programmes.show_description: Court TV's team of world class journalists break down the day's breaking news stories and preview the next day's court docket.
Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.
Nanny Abduction Murder Trial
Nanny Abduction Murder Trial

The beauty queen and the buried riches. How a love triangle, drugs and a wild treasure hunt, all lead to murder. The fascinating case of Sandy Murphy
When California overturned the death penalty, one of America's most notorious criminals took center stage, as parole suddenly became a terrifyingly real option for Charles Manson.
...With Vinnie Politan. The series looks beyond the usual suspects to bring you the gripping stories of everyday people caught up in a world of deception and manipulation as they become accomplices.

Kickstart Court TV's compelling trial day ahead. Joined by a team of top trial attorneys and forensic experts, Grant covers the high-stakes trials that are on the docket, and the true crime cases!
Your Front Row Seat to Justice. Taking you beyond the headlines and into the courtroom, with in-depth legal reporting and expert analysis of the most important and compelling trials.

A real estate mogul with mafia connections is found brutally murdered in the Nevada desert.  Was it the mob, or his marriage, that led to his ultimate demise?
